requirements.full_sentence:
(a) These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Information
Technology Governance, Risk, Controls and Assurance Practices) Directions,
2023.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Information Technology Governance, Risk, Controls and Assurance Practices) Directions, 2023

requirements.full_sentence: (c) These Directions shall come into effect from April 1, 2024.
requirements.object: April 1, 2024

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) These Directions shall be applicable to the following entities (collectively
referred to as 'regulated entities' or 'REs' in these directions):
requirements.object: following entities (collectively referred to as 'regulated entities' or 'REs' in these directions):

requirements.full_sentence: (b) These Directions shall not be applicable to:

(c) In the case of foreign banks operating in India through branch mode, reference
to the board or board of directors in these Directions should be read as
reference to the controlling office/ head office which has the oversight over the
branch operations in India.
requirements.object: to the controlling office/ head office which has the oversight over the branch operations in India

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, such foreign banks shall be subject to a
'comply or explain' approach in terms of the applicability of these Directions.
requirements.object: 'comply or explain' approach in terms of the applicability of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
The 'comply or explain' approach shall allow such foreign banks to deviate
from any specific part of these Directions subject to examination and
acceptance by Reserve Bank of a reasonably justifiable explanation for the
same, as part of the supervisory process.
requirements.object: to deviate from any specific part of these Directions subject to examination and acceptance by Reserve Bank of a reasonably j

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein
shall bear the meanings assigned to them below:
requirements.object: to them below:

requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) 'Cyber incident3' shall mean a cyber event that adversely affects the
cyber security of an information asset whether resulting from
malicious activity or not.
requirements.object: that adversely affects the cyber security of an information asset whether resulting from malicious activity or not

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) All expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or Credit Information Companies
(Regulation) Act, 2005 or Information Technology Act, 2000 or Companies
Act, 2013 and Rules made thereunder or any statutory modification or re-
enactment thereto or as used in RBI Directions / Circulars, as the case may
be.
requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or Credit Informatio

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) The key focus areas of IT Governance shall include strategic alignment, risk
management, resource management, performance management and
Business Continuity/ Disaster Recovery Management.
requirements.object: management, resource management, performance management and Business Continuity/ Disaster Recovery Management

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) REs shall put in place a robust IT Governance Framework based on the
aforementioned focus areas that inter alia:
requirements.object: robust IT Governance Framework based on the aforementioned focus areas that inter alia:

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) Enterprise-wide risk management policy or operational risk management
policy shall also incorporate periodic assessment of IT-related risks (both
inherent and potential risk).
requirements.object: of IT-related risks (both inherent and potential risk)

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) The strategies and policies related to IT, Information Assets, Business
Continuity, Information Security, Cyber Security (including Incident Response
and Recovery Management/ Cyber Crisis Management) shall be approved by
the Board of Directors.
requirements.object: Board of Directors

requirements.full_sentence: (b) Such strategies and policies shall be reviewed at least annually by the Board.
requirements.object: annually by the Board

requirements.full_sentence: (a) REs shall establish a Board-level IT Strategy Committee (ITSC)8.
requirements.object: Strategy Committee (ITSC)8

requirements.full_sentence: (b) While constituting the ITSC, REs shall ensure:

requirements.object: and have substantial IT expertise9 in managing/ guiding information technology initiatives

requirements.full_sentence: (c) The ITSC shall meet at least on a quarterly basis.
requirements.object: a quarterly basis

requirements.full_sentence:
(d) The ITSC shall:
8 Foreign banks operating in India through branch mode need not constitute any Committees (Board or Executive level) referred in this Master Direction at the branch level.
requirements.object: operating in India through branch mode need not constitute any Committees (Board or Executive level) referred in this Master Directi

requirements.full_sentence: They may leverage upon controlling office/ head office/ regional/ zonal Committees for compliance with this Master Direction as long as governance obligations / responsibilities outlined for the prescribed committees are met.
requirements.object: head office/ regional/ zonal Committees for compliance with this Master Direction as long as governance obligations

requirements.full_sentence: 9 "Substantial IT expertise" means the person has a minimum of seven years of experience in managing information systems and/or leading/ guiding technology/ cybersecurity initiatives/ projects.
requirements.object: minimum of seven years of experience in managing information systems and/or leading/ guiding technology/ cybersecurity initiatives/ p

requirements.full_sentence: Such a member should also understand the business processes at a broader level and the impact of IT on such processes.
requirements.object: processes at a broader level and the impact of IT on such processes

requirements.full_sentence: (a) The Senior Management of the RE shall, inter alia, ensure:

(b) REs shall establish an IT Steering Committee with representation at Senior
Management level from IT and business functions.
requirements.object: Committee with representation at Senior Management level from IT and business functions

requirements.full_sentence: (c) The responsibilities of IT Steering Committee, inter alia, shall be to:
(d) The IT Steering Committee shall meet at least on a quarterly basis.
requirements.object: a quarterly basis

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) REs shall appoint a sufficiently senior level, technically competent and
experienced official in IT related aspects as Head of IT Function12.
requirements.object: level, technically competent and experienced official in IT related aspects as Head of IT Function12

requirements.full_sentence: (b) The Head of IT Function shall, inter alia, be responsible for the following:
requirements.object: responsible for the following:

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) As a first line of defence, the Head of IT Function shall ensure effective
assessment, evaluation and management of IT controls and IT risk, including
the implementation of robust internal controls, to (i) secure the RE's
information assets (ii) comply with extant internal policies, regulatory and legal
requirements on IT related aspects.
requirements.object: and management of IT controls and IT risk, including the implementation of robust internal controls, to (i) se

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) REs shall put in place a robust IT Service Management Framework for
supporting their information systems and infrastructure to ensure the
operational resilience of their entire IT environment (including DR sites).
requirements.object: robust IT Service Management Framework for supporting their information systems and infrastructure to ensure the operational resilience

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) A Service Level Management (SLM) process shall be put in place to manage
the IT operations while ensuring effective segregation of duties.
requirements.object: to manage the IT operations while ensuring effective segregation of duties

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) REs shall ensure identification and mapping of the security classification (in
terms of Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability) of information assets based
on their criticality to the REs' operations.
requirements.object: of the security classification (in terms of Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability) of information assets base

requirements.full_sentence:
(d) For seamless continuity of business operations, REs shall avoid using
outdated and unsupported hardware or software and shall monitor software's
end-of-support (EOS) date and Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC) dates of
IT hardware on an ongoing basis.
requirements.object: unsupported hardware or software and shall monitor software's end-of-support (EOS) date and Annual Maintenance Contract (AMC)

requirements.full_sentence:
(e) REs shall develop a technology refresh plan for the replacement of hardware
and software in a timely manner before they reach EOS.
requirements.object: plan for the replacement of hardware and software in a timely manner before they reach EOS

requirements.full_sentence:
Third-Party Arrangements
Where third-party arrangements in the Information Technology/ Cyber Security
ecosystem are not within the applicability of the Reserve Bank of India (Outsourcing
of Information Technology Services) Directions, 2023, REs shall, put in place
appropriate vendor risk assessment process and controls proportionate to the
assessed risk and materiality to, inter alia:
requirements.object: appropriate vendor risk assessment process and controls proportionate to the assessed risk and materiality to, inter alia:

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) REs shall ensure that information systems and infrastructure are able to support
business functions and ensure availability of all service delivery channels.
requirements.object: and infrastructure are able to support business functions and ensure availability of all service delivery channels

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) On an annual or more frequent basis, REs shall proactively assess capacity
requirement of IT resources.
requirements.object: of IT resources

requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall ensure that IT capacity planning across
components, services, system resources, supporting infrastructure is consistent
with past trends (peak usage), the current business requirements and projected
future needs as per the IT strategy of the RE.
requirements.object: planning across components, services, system resources, supporting infrastructure is consistent with past trends (peak usage),

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) The assessment of IT capacity requirements and measures taken to address the
issues shall be reviewed by the ITSC.
requirements.object: ITSC

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) REs shall follow a consistent and formally defined project management approach
for IT projects undertaken by them.
requirements.object: formally defined project management approach for IT projects undertaken by them

requirements.full_sentence:
The project management approach shall,
inter alia, enable appropriate stakeholder participation for effective monitoring
and management of project risks and progress.
requirements.object: appropriate stakeholder participation for effective monitoring and management of project risks and progress

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) While adopting new or emerging technologies, tools, or revamping their existing
ones in the technology stack, REs shall follow a standard enterprise architecture
planning methodology or framework.
requirements.object: architecture planning methodology or framework

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) Adoption of new or emerging technologies shall be commensurate with the risk
appetite and align with overall Business/ IT strategy of the RE.
requirements.object: risk appetite and align with overall Business/ IT strategy of the RE

requirements.full_sentence:
It should facilitate
optimal creation, use, or sharing of information by a business in a secure and
resilient way.
requirements.object: or sharing of information by a business in a secure and resilient way

requirements.full_sentence:
(d) REs shall maintain enterprise data dictionary to enable the sharing of data among
applications and information systems and promote a common understanding of
data.
requirements.object: to enable the sharing of data among applications and information systems and promote a common understanding of dat

requirements.full_sentence:
(e) REs shall ensure that maintenance and necessary support of software
applications is provided by the software vendors and the same is enforced
through formal agreement.
requirements.object: necessary support of software applications is provided by the software vendors and the same is enforced through formal agr

requirements.full_sentence: (f) REs shall obtain the source codes for all critical applications from their vendors.
requirements.object: for all critical applications from their vendors

conditions: Where obtaining of the source code is not possible
requirements.full_sentence:
Where obtaining of the source code is not possible, REs shall put in place a
source code escrow arrangement or other arrangements to adequately mitigate
the risk of default by the vendor.
requirements.object: source code escrow arrangement or other arrangements to adequately mitigate the risk of default by the vendor

requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall ensure that all product updates and
programme fixes are included in the source code escrow arrangement.
requirements.object: updates and programme fixes are included in the source code escrow arrangement

requirements.full_sentence:
(g) REs shall obtain a certificate or a written confirmation from the application
developer or vendor stating that the application is free of known vulnerabilities,
malware, and any covert channels in the code.
requirements.object: a written confirmation from the application developer or vendor stating that the application is free of known vulnerabilities,

requirements.full_sentence:
Such a certificate or a written
confirmation shall also be obtained whenever material changes to the code,
including upgrades, occur.
requirements.object: material changes to the code, including upgrades, occur

requirements.full_sentence:
(h) Any new IT application proposed to be introduced as a business product13 shall
be subjected to product approval and quality assurance process.
requirements.object: approval and quality assurance process

requirements.full_sentence:
Change and Patch Management
REs shall put in place documented policy(ies) and procedures for change and patch
management to ensure the following:
requirements.object: policy(ies) and procedures for change and patch management to ensure the following:

requirements.full_sentence:
Data Migration Controls
REs shall have a documented data migration policy specifying a systematic process
for data migration, ensuring data integrity, completeness and consistency.
requirements.object: migration policy specifying a systematic process for data migration, ensuring data integrity, completeness and consistency

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy
shall, inter alia, contain provisions pertaining to signoffs from business users and
application owners at each stage of migration, maintenance of audit trails, etc.
requirements.object: provisions pertaining to signoffs from business users and application owners at each stage of migration, maintenance of audit tr

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) Every IT application which can access or affect critical or sensitive information,
shall have necessary audit and system logging capability and should provide
audit trails.
requirements.object: system logging capability and should provide audit trails

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) The audit trails shall satisfy a RE's business requirements apart from regulatory
and legal requirements.
requirements.object: requirements apart from regulatory and legal requirements

conditions:
when required and assist in dispute
resolution
requirements.full_sentence:
The audit trails must be detailed enough to facilitate the
conduct of audit, serve as forensic evidence when required and assist in dispute
resolution, including for non-repudiation purposes.
requirements.object: facilitate the conduct of audit, serve as forensic evidence when required and assist in dispute resolution, including for non-re

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) REs shall put in place a system for regularly monitoring the audit trails and
system logs to detect any unauthorised activity.
requirements.object: system for regularly monitoring the audit trails and system logs to detect any unauthorised activity

requirements.full_sentence:
Cryptographic controls
The key length, algorithms, cipher suites and applicable protocols used in transmission
channels, processing of data and authentication purpose shall be strong.

REs shall
adopt internationally accepted and published standards that are not deprecated/
demonstrated to be insecure/ vulnerable and the configurations involved in
implementing such controls shall be compliant with extant laws and regulatory
instructions.
requirements.object: published standards that are not deprecated/ demonstrated to be insecure/ vulnerable and the configurations involve

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) In order to prevent unauthorised modification of data, REs shall ensure that there
is no manual intervention or manual modification in data while it is being
transferred from one process to another or from one application to another, in
respect of critical applications.
requirements.object: no manual intervention or manual modification in data while it is being transferred from one process to another or from one appli

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) Data transfer mechanism between processes or applications must be properly
tested, securely automated with necessary checks and balances, and properly
integrated through "Straight Through Processing" methodology with appropriate
authentication mechanism and audit trails.
requirements.object: automated with necessary checks and balances, and properly integrated through "Straight Through Processing" methodology w

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) REs shall implement suitable physical and environmental controls in Data Centre
and Disaster Recovery14 sites used by them.
requirements.object: environmental controls in Data Centre and Disaster Recovery14 sites used by them

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) The DC and DR sites should be geographically well separated so that both the
sites are not affected by a similar threat associated to their location.
requirements.object: so that both the sites are not affected by a similar threat associated to their location

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) REs shall ensure that their DC and DR sites are subjected to necessary e-
surveillance mechanism.
requirements.object: and DR sites are subjected to necessary e- surveillance mechanism

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) Access to information assets shall be allowed only where a valid business need
exists.
requirements.object: a valid business need exists

requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall have documented standards and procedures, which are
approved by the ITSC and kept up to date for administering need-based access
to an information system.
requirements.object: procedures, which are approved by the ITSC and kept up to date for administering need-based access to an information sys

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) Personnel with elevated system access entitlements shall be closely supervised
with all their systems activities logged and periodically reviewed.
requirements.object: all their systems activities logged and periodically reviewed

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) REs shall adopt multi-factor authentication for privileged users of i) critical
information systems and ii) for critical activities, basis the RE's risk assessment.
requirements.object: privileged users of i) critical information systems and ii) for critical activities, basis the RE's risk assessm

requirements.full_sentence:
Controls on Teleworking
In the teleworking environment, REs, inter alia, shall:

(a) REs shall define suitable metrics for system performance, recovery and business
resumption, including Recovery Point Objective (RPO) and Recovery Time
Objective (RTO), for all critical information systems.
requirements.object: system performance, recovery and business resumption, including Recovery Point Objective (RPO) and Recovery Time Objective

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) For non-critical information systems, REs shall adopt a risk-based approach to
define suitable metrics.
requirements.object: to define suitable metrics

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) REs shall implement suitable scorecard/ metrics/ methodology to measure IT
performance and IT maturity level.
requirements.object: methodology to measure IT performance and IT maturity level

requirements.full_sentence:
Periodic review of IT related risks
The risk management policy of the RE shall include IT related risks, including the
Cyber Security related risks, and the Risk Management Committee of the Board
(RMCB) in consultation with the ITSC shall periodically review and update the same
at least on a yearly basis.
requirements.object: including the Cyber Security related risks, and the Risk Management Committee of the Board (RMCB) in consultation with the I

requirements.full_sentence:
IT and Information Security Risk Management Framework
REs shall establish a robust IT and Information Security Risk Management
Framework15 covering, inter alia, the following aspects:
requirements.object: and Information Security Risk Management Framework15 covering, inter alia, the following aspects:
their efficacy in a risk environment characterised by change

requirements.full_sentence:
Areas of possible role conflicts and
accountability gaps must be specifically identified and eliminated or managed;
requirements.object: eliminated or managed

requirements.full_sentence:
and
15 REs may have flexibility to define Information / Cyber security risk management framework distinct from IT risk management framework.
requirements.object: Information / Cyber security risk management framework distinct from IT risk management framework

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) The Information Security Policy shall take into consideration, inter alia, aspects
such as the objectives, scope, ownership and responsibility for the Policy;
requirements.object: alia, aspects such as the objectives, scope, ownership and responsibility for the Policy

requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall also put in place a
Cyber Security Policy and Cyber Crisis Management Plan (CCMP).
requirements.object: a Cyber Security Policy and Cyber Crisis Management Plan (CCMP)

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) An Information Security Committee (ISC), under the oversight of the ITSC, shall
be formed for managing cyber/ information security.
requirements.object: cyber/ information security

requirements.full_sentence:
The constitution of the ISC,
with Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) and other representatives from
business and IT functions, etc., shall be decided by the ITSC.
requirements.object: ITSC

requirements.full_sentence:
The head of the
ISC shall be from risk management vertical.
requirements.object: vertical

requirements.full_sentence:
Major responsibilities of the ISC,
inter alia, shall include:

(c) A senior level executive (preferably in the rank of a General Manager or an
equivalent position) shall be designated as the Chief Information Security Officer
(CISO).
requirements.object: Chief Information Security Officer (CISO)

requirements.full_sentence:
The CISO shall not have any direct reporting relationship with the Head
of IT Function and shall not be given any business targets.
requirements.object: relationship with the Head of IT Function and shall not be given any business targets

requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall ensure the
following:

(d) REs shall ensure that the roles and responsibilities of the CISO are clearly
defined and documented covering, at a minimum, the following points:
requirements.object: and responsibilities of the CISO are clearly defined and documented covering, at a minimum, the following points:

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) The CISO shall be responsible for driving cyber security strategy and
ensuring compliance to the extant regulatory/ statutory instructions on
information/ cyber security.
requirements.object: cyber security strategy and ensuring compliance to the extant regulatory/ statutory instructions on information/ cyber secu

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) The CISO shall be responsible for enforcing the policies that a RE uses to
protect its information assets apart from coordinating information/ cyber
security related issues within the RE as well as with relevant external
agencies.
requirements.object: the policies that a RE uses to protect its information assets apart from coordinating information/ cyber security related

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) The CISO shall be a permanent invitee to the ITSC and IT Steering
Committee.
requirements.object: to the ITSC and IT Steering Committee

requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) The CISO's Office shall manage and monitor Security Operations Centre
(SOC) and drive cyber security related projects.
requirements.object: Operations Centre (SOC) and drive cyber security related projects

requirements.full_sentence:
(v) The CISO's office shall ensure effective functioning of the security solutions
deployed.
requirements.object: the security solutions deployed

requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) The CISO shall directly report to the Executive Director or equivalent
executive overseeing the risk management function;
requirements.object: Executive Director or equivalent executive overseeing the risk management function

requirements.full_sentence:
(vii) CISO shall place a review of cyber security risks/ arrangements/
preparedness of the RE before the Board/ RMCB/ ITSC atleast on a
quarterly basis.
requirements.object: cyber security risks/ arrangements/ preparedness of the RE before the Board/ RMCB/ ITSC atleast on a quarterly basis

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) The risk assessment for each information asset within the RE's scope shall be
guided by appropriate security standards/ IT control frameworks.
requirements.object: security standards/ IT control frameworks

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) REs shall ensure that all staff members and service providers comply with the
extant information security and acceptable-use policies as applicable to them.
requirements.object: members and service providers comply with the extant information security and acceptable-use policies as applicable to them

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) REs shall review their security infrastructure and security policies at least
annually, factoring in their own experiences and emerging threats and risks.
requirements.object: and security policies at least annually, factoring in their own experiences and emerging threats and risks

requirements.full_sentence:
REs
shall take steps to adequately tackle cyber-attacks including phishing, spoofing
attacks and mitigate their adverse effects.
requirements.object: tackle cyber-attacks including phishing, spoofing attacks and mitigate their adverse effects

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) For critical information systems and/ or those in the De-Militarized Zone (DMZ)
having customer interface, VA shall be conducted at least once in every six
months and PT at least once in 12 months.
requirements.object: once in every six months and PT at least once in 12 months

requirements.full_sentence:
Also, REs shall conduct VA/ PT of
such information systems throughout their lifecycle (pre-implementation, post
implementation, after major changes, etc.).
requirements.object: such information systems throughout their lifecycle (pre-implementation, post implementation, after major changes, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) For non-critical information systems, a risk-based approach shall be adopted to
decide the requirement and periodicity of conduct of VA/ PT.
requirements.object: the requirement and periodicity of conduct of VA/ PT

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) VA/ PT shall be conducted by appropriately trained and independent information
security experts/ auditors.
requirements.object: trained and independent information security experts/ auditors

requirements.full_sentence:
(d) In the post implementation (of IT project/ system upgrade, etc.) scenario, the VA/
PT shall be performed on the production environment.
requirements.object: production environment

conditions: if the PT is conducted in test environment
requirements.full_sentence:
Under unavoidable
circumstances, if the PT is conducted in test environment, REs shall ensure that
the version and configuration of the test environment resembles the production
environment.
requirements.object: and configuration of the test environment resembles the production environment

requirements.full_sentence: Any deviation should be documented and approved by the ISC.
requirements.object: by the ISC

requirements.full_sentence:
(e) REs shall ensure to fix the identified vulnerabilities and associated risks in a time-
bound manner by undertaking requisite corrective measures and ensure that the
compliance is sustained to avoid recurrence of known vulnerabilities such as
those available in Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVE) database.
requirements.object: identified vulnerabilities and associated risks in a time- bound manner by undertaking requisite corrective measures and ensure that

requirements.full_sentence:
(f) REs shall put in place a documented approach for conduct of VA/ PT covering
the scope, coverage, vulnerability scoring mechanism (e.g., Common
Vulnerability Scoring System) and all other aspects.
requirements.object: documented approach for conduct of VA/ PT covering the scope, coverage, vulnerability scoring mechanism (e

requirements.full_sentence:
This may also apply to the
RE's information systems hosted in a cloud environment.
requirements.object: RE's information systems hosted in a cloud environment

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) The cyber incident response and recovery management policy shall address the
classification and assessment of incidents;
requirements.object: assessment of incidents

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) REs shall analyse cyber incidents (including through forensic analysis, if
necessary) for their severity, impact and root cause.
requirements.object: through forensic analysis

requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall take measures,
corrective and preventive, to mitigate the adverse impact of incidents on
business operations.
requirements.object: preventive, to mitigate the adverse impact of incidents on business operations

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) REs shall have written incident response and recovery procedures including
identification of key roles of staff/ outsourced staff handling such incidents.
requirements.object: and recovery procedures including identification of key roles of staff/ outsourced staff handling such incidents

requirements.full_sentence:
(d) REs shall have clear communication plans for escalation and reporting the
incidents to the Board and Senior Management as well as to customers, as
required.
requirements.object: for escalation and reporting the incidents to the Board and Senior Management as well as to customers, as required

requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall pro-actively notify CERT-In and RBI17 regarding incidents, as
per regulatory requirements.
requirements.object: RBI17 regarding incidents, as per regulatory requirements

requirements.full_sentence:
(e) REs shall establish processes to improve incident response and recovery
activities and capabilities through lessons learnt from past incidents as well as
from the conduct of tests and drills.
requirements.object: incident response and recovery activities and capabilities through lessons learnt from past incidents as well as from t

requirements.full_sentence:
REs, inter alia, shall ensure effectiveness of
crisis communication plan/ process by conduct of periodic drills/ testing with
stakeholders (including service providers).
requirements.object: communication plan/ process by conduct of periodic drills/ testing with stakeholders (including service providers)

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) The BCP and DR policy shall adopt best practices18 to guide its actions in
reducing the likelihood or impact of the disruptive incidents and maintaining
business continuity.
requirements.object: guide its actions in reducing the likelihood or impact of the disruptive incidents and maintaining business continuity

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall be updated based on major developments/
risk assessment.
requirements.object: major developments/ risk assessment

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) RE's BCP/ DR capabilities shall be designed to effectively support its resilience
objectives and enable it to rapidly recover and securely resume its critical
operations (including security controls) post cyber-attacks/ other incidents.
requirements.object: support its resilience objectives and enable it to rapidly recover and securely resume its critical operations (including s

requirements.full_sentence: 17 In respect of Housing Finance Companies, cyber incidents shall continue to be reported to NHB and not RBI.
requirements.object: to NHB and not RBI

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) Periodicity of DR drills for critical information systems shall be at least on a half-
yearly basis and for other information systems, as per RE's risk assessment.
requirements.object: a half- yearly basis and for other information systems, as per RE's risk assessment

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) Any major issues observed during the DR drill shall be resolved and tested again
to ensure successful conduct of drill before the next cycle.
requirements.object: again to ensure successful conduct of drill before the next cycle

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) The DR testing shall involve switching over to the DR / alternate site and thus
using it as the primary site for sufficiently long period where usual business
operations of at least a full working day (including Beginning of Day to End of
Day operations) are covered.
requirements.object: the DR / alternate site and thus using it as the primary site for sufficiently long period where usual business operations o

requirements.full_sentence:
(d) REs shall regularly test the BCP / DR under different scenarios for possible types
of contingencies, to ensure that it is up-to-date and effective.
requirements.object: / DR under different scenarios for possible types of contingencies, to ensure that it is up-to-date and effective

requirements.full_sentence:
(e) REs shall backup data and periodically restore such backed-up data to check its
usability.
requirements.object: restore such backed-up data to check its usability

requirements.full_sentence:
The integrity of such backup data shall be preserved along with
securing it from unauthorised access.
requirements.object: securing it from unauthorised access

requirements.full_sentence:
(f) REs shall ensure that DR architecture and procedures are robust, meeting the
defined RTO and RPO for any recovery operations in case of contingency.
requirements.object: and procedures are robust, meeting the defined RTO and RPO for any recovery operations in case of contingency

requirements.full_sentence:
(g) REs should prioritise achieving minimal RTO (as approved by the RE's ITSC)
and a near zero RPO for critical information systems.
requirements.object: (as approved by the RE's ITSC) and a near zero RPO for critical information systems

requirements.full_sentence:
(h) In a scenario of non-zero RPO, REs shall have a documented methodology for
reconciliation of data while resuming operations from the alternate location.
requirements.object: for reconciliation of data while resuming operations from the alternate location

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) REs shall ensure that the configurations of information systems and deployed
security patches at the DC and DR19 are identical.
requirements.object: of information systems and deployed security patches at the DC and DR19 are identical

requirements.full_sentence:
(j) REs shall ensure BCP and DR capabilities in critical interconnected systems and
networks including those of vendors and partners.
requirements.object: capabilities in critical interconnected systems and networks including those of vendors and partners

requirements.full_sentence:
REs shall ensure
demonstrated readiness through collaborative and co-ordinated resilience
testing that meets the REs' RTO.
requirements.object: collaborative and co-ordinated resilience testing that meets the REs' RTO

requirements.full_sentence:
(a) The Audit Committee of the Board (ACB) shall be responsible for exercising
oversight of IS Audit of the RE.
requirements.object: oversight of IS Audit of the RE

requirements.full_sentence: (b) REs shall put in place an IS Audit Policy.
requirements.object: IS Audit Policy

requirements.full_sentence:
The IS Audit Policy shall contain a clear
description of its mandate, purpose, authority, audit universe, periodicity of audit
etc.
requirements.object: of its mandate, purpose, authority, audit universe, periodicity of audit etc

requirements.full_sentence: The policy shall be approved by the ACB and reviewed at least annually.
requirements.object: ACB and reviewed at least annually

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) The ACB shall review critical issues highlighted related to IT / information security
/ cyber security and provide appropriate direction and guidance to the RE's
Management.
requirements.object: related to IT / information security / cyber security and provide appropriate direction and guidance to the RE's Ma

requirements.full_sentence:
(d) REs shall have a separate IS Audit function or resources who possess required
professional skills and competence within the Internal Audit function.
requirements.object: Audit function or resources who possess required professional skills and competence within the Internal Audit function

requirements.full_sentence: (e) REs shall carry out IS Audit planning by adopting a risk-based audit approach.
requirements.object: planning by adopting a risk-based audit approach

requirements.full_sentence:
(f) REs may consider, wherever possible, a continuous auditing approach for critical
systems, performing control and risk assessments on a more frequent basis.

Chapter VII - Repeal and Other Provisions
With the issue of these Directions, the instructions/ guidelines contained in the
circulars issued by the Reserve Bank of India listed in Annex shall stand repealed
from the dates mentioned in the said Annex.
requirements.object: dates mentioned in the said Annex

requirements.full_sentence:
All the instructions/ guidelines given in
the circulars referred above shall be deemed as given under these Directions.
requirements.object: under these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
Any
reference in other circulars/ guidelines/ notifications issued by the Reserve Bank
containing reference to the said repealed circulars, shall mean the reference to these
Directions, namely, the Reserve Bank of India (Information Technology Governance,
Risk, Controls and Assurance Practices) Directions, 2023, after the date of repeal.
requirements.object: these Directions, namely, the Reserve Bank of India (Information Technology Governance, Risk, Controls and Assurance Practices)

requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken, purported to have been taken or
initiated under the circulars hereby repealed shall continue to be governed by the
provisions of the said circulars/ guidelines/ notifications.
requirements.object: by the provisions of the said circulars/ guidelines/ notifications

requirements.full_sentence:
Application of other laws not barred
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in
force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

requirements.full_sentence:
Interpretation
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the Reserve Bank of India may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank of India shall be final and
binding.
